entries.title: Junior
entries.subtitle: The boy I once knew but now remember

entries.title: The Years Between
entries.subtitle: The story of a teenage boy and his mother.

entries.title: In The Navy
entries.subtitle: A recollection of a unique although small chapter of my life when I undertook my National Service training in the Royal Australian Navy

entries.title: The Army Years - Part 1 - The Young Soldier Surveyor
entries.subtitle: From rigorous basic training in Kapooka to the specialized field projects of the Survey Corps, this is the compelling journey of a young Australian soldier's rise through the ranks. Follow his path of discipline, sacrifice, and dedication as he navigates early military life to earn his commission as an army officer.

entries.title: The Army Years - Part 2 - Being an Officer
entries.subtitle: In mid-20th century Sydney, a service family navigates the era's housing market, contending with military relocation stipulations and societal aftermath of conflict.

entries.title: The Army Years - Part 3 - Singapore
entries.subtitle: A military family navigates the intricate logistics of an overseas posting to Singapore, meticulously preparing for their two-year assignment under mid-century Commonwealth administration.

entries.title: The Army Years – Part 4 - Now a Major
entries.subtitle: Chronicling an Australian officer's early 1970s career transition, this document details his family's move and his attendance at Queenscliff's historic Staff College.
